title: cremanthodium bupleurifolium
intro: Cremanthodium bupleurifolium, also known as the Bupleurum-leaved Cremanthodium, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of Sichuan and Yunnan provinces in China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. Cremanthodium bupleurifolium is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its health benefits and is considered a valuable resource in traditional Chinese medicine.
